name: Cycloid
description: Cycloid offers a comprehensive DevOps platform designed to enhance developer experience through its user-friendly self-service portal. The platform simplifies cloud migration, supports hybrid cloud environments, and centralizes cost management, making it easier to efficiently manage complex cloud infrastructures.

name: Adastra
description: Engage with a trusted AWS, Google Cloud and Microsoft partner which will help you maximize cloud ROI. Embark on your cloud journey with Adastra to confidently reshape your business for a digital future. Access a comprehensive suite of tools for swift and secure migration, optimizing costs and ensuring compliance.

name: Crayon Group
description: Crayon specializes in cloud consulting and offers services that support businesses in their digital transformation, including cloud migration. Their expertise in cloud architecture and technology optimization ensures efficient cloud-first strategies.

name: Frontier Digital
description: The company has extensive expertise in cloud computing and automation, having successfully delivered secure and cost-effective cloud platforms globally. Their approach to technology change emphasizes agile methodologies and continuous improvement, making them well-equipped to handle cloud migration effectively.

name: CloudMile
description: CloudMile specializes in cloud migration, offering professional services to help businesses transition to the cloud effectively. Their mission is to empower enterprises through modernized IT solutions and scalable digital transformations.

name: RiverMeadow - Workload Mobility Platform
description: RiverMeadow specializes in multi-cloud migration services, offering a proprietary Mobility Platform that simplifies the transition of workloads to various cloud environments like AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud. Their comprehensive tools and automated processes ensure secure and efficient cloud migrations, making it easier for businesses to modernize and protect their IT systems.

name: Cloud4C
description: Cloud4C specializes in comprehensive cloud migration services, ensuring a seamless transition of your entire IT environment to a cloud platform of your choice, with a focus on innovation and enhancing customer experiences. Their expertise and structured approach to cloud adoption make them a trusted partner for enterprises looking to modernize and transform digitally.

name: cloudxchange.io
description: At cloudxchange.io, a multi-cloud managed services provider under the NSEIT Group, they specialize in cloud migration, offering advanced consulting and tailored solutions for seamless digital transformation across major platforms like AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud. Their expert team ensures a smooth transition, helping businesses gain visibility into cloud costs and align financial data with business metrics.

name: Cloud Mile Inc.
description: CloudMile is a specialized cloud and AI service provider that focuses on cloud migration, offering advanced solutions to accelerate digital transformation. Their expertise in application modernization and multi-cloud deployments, combined with their status as a Google Cloud Premier Partner, positions them as a key player in facilitating efficient and cost-effective cloud migration for businesses.

name: Hivemind Technologies AG
description: The company specializes in developing custom-tailored and affordable migration plans that align with your budget and business needs, ensuring secure cloud solutions. With their extensive experience and expertise, they are well-equipped to support your cloud migration projects.
